en: Hello?
Hello, I'm Josephine March. I'm Jo... Josephine, is that you?
ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 조세핀 마치입니다. 저... 조세핀, 당신 맞나요?

en: Welcome! Welcome!
This is Kitty and Minnie.
I see that you have already met our professor.
He's a very accomplished man.
And your mother says that you are a writer.
ko: 그리고 당신의 어머니가 당신은 작가라고 하셨어요.

en: I keep a diary, you know.
And a lot of interesting people here.
Intellectuals and Europeans.
Jo, I hope it is alright.
I got your address from Miss Kirk.
Who is this? Who are you? I'm so sorry to intrude.
I was close by and I thought I...
But I'll be going. No! No, please stay.
ko: 하지만 이제 가야겠어요. 아니! 제발 계세요.

en: We have more than enough room. Someone tell me who this man is.
ko: 공간은 충분해요. 누가 이분이 누구인지 말해줘요.

en: I don't want to be a burden. Oh, you're not a burden at all. Yes, of course. Please. I'm Laurie. Who are you? I'm Frederic Baer.
ko: 저는 폐가 되고 싶지 않아요. 아, 전혀 폐가 아니에요. 네, 물론이죠. 제발요. 저는 로리예요. 당신은 누구신가요? 저는 프레드릭 베어입니다.

en: We were at the same boarding house together in New York.
Oh, Jo, he's very handsome.
Do you intend to stay in here?
